attempts.last_message_excerpt: {"title":"Experiment Harness Setup","summary":"Restore the shared harness contract bundle from `origin/main` first so paths, profiles, helper functions, and entrypoint ids are frozen in one place. Then fan out into two parallel branches: one restores the default remote-target lifecycle for prerequisite checks, upstream bootstrap, and safe local cleanup, while the other restores the tracked sample fixture profile and network-free materialization lane.
